title: Infinity sword
description: It basically adds a sword that can kill any enemy in one hit.
body:
### Description :

**This mod adds an extremely powerful sword that can defeat almost any mob with a single hit. It is designed for fun, testing, or creative gameplay where you want a simple way to eliminate powerful enemies quickly.**

The sword deals massive damage and is capable of defeating most vanilla mobs and many modded mobs instantly.


<details>
<summary>note</summary>

Note①:
Some mobs from certain mods may not be affected by the sword due to special damage protection or custom mechanics. In those cases, the mob might not be defeated in one hit.

Note②:
Also, since this mod is still under development, it can currently only be obtained in creative mode or with the give command. This may add recipes etc. in future updates.
</details>



Use it wisely.
